channel.title: Shop Beat Solutions (Pty) LTD — recent CVEs
channel.description: Most recent CVEs assigned by Shop Beat Solutions (Pty) LTD (shopbeat).

image.title: Shop Beat Solutions (Pty) LTD — recent CVEs

item.title: CVE-2022-36250 · 8.8 HIGH 🌩️ — Cross Site Request Forgery on Shop Beat Services
item.description: Shop Beat Solutions (Pty) LTD Shop Beat Media Player 2.5.95 up to 3.2.57 is vulnerable to Cross Site Request Forgery (CSRF).

item.title: CVE-2022-36249 · 5.4 MEDIUM — Shop Beat Services Vulnerable To Bypass 2FA via APIs
item.description: Shop Beat Solutions (Pty) LTD Shop Beat Media Player 2.5.95 up to 3.2.57 is vulnerable to Bypass 2FA via APIs. For Controlpanel Lite. "After login we are directly able to use the bearer token or jsession ID to access the apis instead of entering the…

item.title: CVE-2022-36247 · 9.1 CRITICAL 🌩️ — Shop Beat Services Vulnerable To IDOR
item.description: Shop Beat Solutions (Pty) LTD Shop Beat Media Player 2.5.95 up to 3.2.57 is vulnerable to IDOR via controlpanel.shopbeat.co.za.

item.title: CVE-2022-36246 · 9.8 CRITICAL 🌩️ — Shop Beat Services Vulnerable To Insecure Permissions
item.description: Shop Beat Solutions (Pty) LTD Shop Beat Media Player 2.5.95 up to 3.2.57 is vulnerable to Insecure Permissions.

item.title: CVE-2022-36244 · 5.4 MEDIUM — Multiple Stored Cross-Site Scripting Vulnerabilities on Shop Beat Services
item.description: Shop Beat Solutions (Pty) LTD Shop Beat Media Player 2.5.95 up to 3.2.57 suffers from Multiple Stored Cross-Site Scripting (XSS) vulnerabilities via Shop Beat Control Panel found at www.shopbeat.co.za controlpanel.shopbeat.co.za.

item.title: CVE-2022-36243 · 5.3 MEDIUM 🌩️ — Directory Traversal on Shop Beat Services
item.description: Shop Beat Solutions (pty) LTD Shop Beat Media Player 2.5.95 up to 3.2.57 is vulnerable to Directory Traversal via server.shopbeat.co.za. Information Exposure Through Directory Listing vulnerability in "studio" software of Shop Beat. This issue affect…
